text: The method setTrackerUrl is registered more than once in "_paq" variable. Only the last call has an effect. Please have a look at the multiple Matomo trackers documentation: https://developer.matomo.org/guides/tracking-javascript-guide#multiple-piwik-trackers

The method setSiteId is registered more than once in "_paq" variable. Only the last call has an effect. Please have a look at the multiple Matomo trackers documentation: https://developer.matomo.org/guides/tracking-javascript-guide#multiple-piwik-trackers
